fields.label: Amended From
fields.description: If this entry was amended from another Production Entry, the original is linked here.

fields.label: Series
fields.description: Auto-generated document number series. Format: PE-2026-00001.

fields.label: Production Date
fields.description: The date this production was carried out. Defaults to today.

fields.label: Station
fields.description: The machine or station where production is taking place, e.g. Flexo 1, Slitter 2.

fields.label: Shift
fields.description: The shift during which production occurred, e.g. Day, Night, Morning.

fields.label: Supervisor
fields.description: Name of the production supervisor overseeing this shift/station.

fields.label: Remarks
fields.description: Any general notes about this production entry.

fields.label: Planning
fields.description: Add rows for each Job Card you plan to produce today. Select the Job Card first - order qty, produced qty, and balance will auto-populate.

fields.label: Planning Lines
fields.description: Each row represents a planned production run for a specific Job Card.

fields.label: Actual Production
fields.description: Record what was actually produced. Select the Job Card, enter Good Qty and Waste Qty. On submit, these totals update the Job Card automatically.

fields.label: Actual Lines
fields.description: Each row records actual production output for a Job Card.

fields.label: Summary
fields.description: Auto-calculated totals across all actual production lines in this entry.

fields.label: Total Good Qty
fields.description: Sum of all Good Qty values from the Actual Lines table.

fields.label: Total Waste Qty
fields.description: Sum of all Waste Qty values from the Actual Lines table.
